title: AleilaMC
description: AleilaMC attempt to put the player in another world with a simple choice of resources.
body:
# AleilaMC

AleilaMC is a modpack which attempt to place the player in another world, with thousands of biome, and a beautiful play, without too much resources.

## Start an adventure
AleilaMC use Origins and MCA to allows you to completely set up your own game start. Starter Kits is also present with an pre configuration, but you can make your own config.

## Explore the world
With more than 70 biomes and 300 structures, you have a lot to discover.

## Enjoy high quality graphism
With shaders, Occulus, Distant Horizons, Reimagined Resource Pack and more !
